characters.description: Adam Gilroy is an assistant district attorney who has assisted the squad with some cases and is unaware thatCarrie Wellshas Hyperthymesia, which leads to him being suspicous that Carrie is wrong because she has no more proof than remembering.

characters.name: Al Burns
characters.description: Al Burnsis one of the characters in the seriesUnforgettable. He is a Detective New York City Police Department.  He isCarrie's partner and ex-boyfriend. Al was Carrie's partner at the Syracuse Police Department. Al made Carrie his partner when Carrie's previous partner forced her to do all of the work while he took all of the credit. Al made Carrie his new partner and, eventually, the two entered a romantic relationship. They collaborated on the murder case ofRachel Wells, Carrie's sister. When the investigation was shut down, Carrie resigned her position and left for New York City. Al eventually moved to New York to take a position with the NYPD. After learning of Carrie's involvement in a case, he comes to her for help. After working together, Al convinces Carrie to return to work as a detective. Although they are no longer in a relationship, Al is very protective of Carrie. His team: includes DetectiveCarrie Wells(Poppy ,oнtgomery) Al's partner and ex-girlfriend, DetectiveMike Costello(Michael Gaston), Al's right-hand man; DetectiveRoe Saunders(Kevin Rankin), the junior member of the team; and DetectiveNina Inara(Daya Vaidya), a sassy, street-smart cop.

characters.name: Alice Wells
characters.description: Carrie Wells's mother has Early-onset Alzheimer's disease and is currently living at a recovery home. She is unaware that her older daughterRachelis dead. It is revealed that she knew the man who killed Rachel, and remembered his name was Jonathan but couldn't remember anything else. She also has a sister named Idie, who revealed Carrie that Jonathan was one of her mother's ex,  who died long before Rachel was murdered.

characters.name: Carrie Wells
characters.description: Edie Wells (aunt)Eddie Martin(ex-husband)Al Burns(ex-boyfriend) Carrie Wellsis the lead protagonist of the TV seriesUnforgettable. She possesses hyperthymesia, a rare medical condition that gives her the ability to remember all she has seen or heard. After her sister died, Carrie became a cop for the Syracuse PD and tried to solve her murder. Following the case being shut down, she gave up and retired from the job, moving to New York City. Almost a decade later, after witnessing a murder, she is convinced by her ex-boyfriendAl Burnsto come back on the job. Little is known about Carrie's childhood. She was born to her mother,Alice Wells, and an unknown father. Carrie also visited her Aunt Edie once in a while. She also grew up having to deal with the loss of her older sisterRachel. An enigmatic former Syracuse, New York police detective, Carrie Wells has hyperthymesia, a rare medical condition that gives her the ability to visually remember everything she has seen, heard, or experienced. This rare condition makes her memory so flawless that every place, every face, every date and time, every object, every event, every conversation, every moment of joy and every heartbreaking incident is forever embedded in her mind. It's not just that shedoesn'tforget anything - she literately can't, no matter how much she may want to or how hard she tries. However, there is one thing she cannot remember: the details that would help solve her sister's long-ago murder. Her ability is very helpful to investigations she and her team are conducting.

characters.name: Henry
characters.description: Henryis an African American tech in NYPD who has appeared in the first two episodes of unforgettable and assisted the team. He is played byKyle Beltran.

characters.name: Joanne Webster
characters.description: Dr. Joanne Websteris Carrie's friend and the gifted but crusty Chief Medical Examiner of New York at the queens PD precint. She is an experienced medical examiner and a new main charecter introduced in Carrie's Caller. Joanne has been relegated to Queens district for speaking out against her superiors. As she's too senior to be fired, they hope to force her to resign.Carrie and Joanne also do a lot of tag-teams, since they are good friends. She was also the first one Carrie told about having a possible lead on her sister's killer.She is very interested in Carrie and her sister's murder as she has had experience with tenaciously hunting down leads for cold cases.

characters.name: Rachel Wells
characters.description: This is not Carrie's sister Rachel it is Katrina, who was kidnapped by her step father who they thought might have been responsible for Rachels death. I have a picture from the end of "The Man in the Woods", but am not sure how to update the image. Rachel Wellsis the murdered older sister of main character DetectiveCarrie Wellsand the daughter ofAlice Wells. Carrie was there when her sister was murdered by an unknown person and she's the reason Carrie became a cop. The person who killed her was either named Johnathan or used the name as an alias. She has only appeared in flashbacks inPilotandLost Things(False. She appears in many episodes via flashbacks). She is played by actressHaley Murphy.

characters.name: Roe Saunders
characters.description: Roe Saundersis a character on the showUnforgettable. He is the junior member of the NYPD homicide squad.He tends to make good-natured jokes about Carrie's ability and he is also fond of a female techno-geek who aids the group with their cases.Roe also tends to have doubts about most cases. He is played by actorKevin Rankin.

He almost broke up with Carrie in "Heartbreak". He owns a restaurant in New York He is played byJackson Hurst.

characters.description: Tanya Sitkowskyis a techno geek who works with the NYPD and it is implied thatRoeis fond of and in love with her. Tanya can also trace anything, even calls from burners.
